newsitems.title: Release Date Announced! Lunarium Launches on July 29, 2026 ✨
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: The moment we've been waiting for is finally here —Lunarium will officially launch on July 29, 2026!If Lunarium has been waiting on your wishlist for a while, thank you for your patience.We would also like to thank everyone who has followed Lunarium, participated in our playtests, supported us, and stayed with us throughout this journey.The stars have been lit.Don't forget to add Lunarium to your wishlist. On July 29, let's set out on a journey guided by the stars together!

newsitems.title: Steam Broadcast Now Live During Nordic Game!
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: The Steam broadcast for Lunarium is now live during Nordic Game — come stop by and check it out!Don’t forget to wishlist Lunarium — Ave and Lune will be meeting everyone very soon. Thank you all for your support!

newsitems.title: Lunarium Heads to the Nordics Next Week!
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: A game called Lunarium was always meant to travel north.From Boston to Kyoto, and now beneath the Nordic sky it finally feels like we’re setting off on a true journey among the stars. ✨Next week, Lunarium will be showcased in Sweden for the first time at Nordic Game.Exhibition Dates: May 26 – May 29Venue: Slagthuset（Jörgen Kocksgatan 7, 211 20 Malmö, Sweden）

newsitems.title: Live Stream Now Available During BitSummit!
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: Lunarium is now live on Steam during BitSummit!Feel free to stop by the stream and check out gameplay footage and game showcases while the event is happening. If you're following BitSummit, we’d love for you to take a look at our stream as well!

newsitems.title: Come experience Lunarium at BitSummit Kyoto!
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: We’re excited to announce that Star Journey will be attending BitSummit in Kyoto next week!This will be our second time showcasing the game in Japan following TGS 2025. We’ve also prepared lots of cute goodies for visitors this time, so feel free to stop by, try the game, and pick up some exclusive merchandise.Development of the game is now nearing completion, and we are currently focusing on the final stages of testing, polishing, and overall refinement. More information regarding the game’s release and future updates will be shared soon.Venue: 3rd Exhibition Hall, 3F, Miyako messeEvent Dates: May 22 – May 24Booth: 1F - A23We look forward to seeing you in Kyoto!

newsitems.title: Come and have a look during the Steam Medieval Festival!
newsitems.author: CocoLa03
newsitems.contents: We have a live-stream during The Steam Medieval Fest~ Come and have a look~

newsitems.title: Lunarium is Heading to PAX East!
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: Hi everyone! We’re excited and honored to share that Lunarium will be showcasing at PAX East this week—one of the most influential gaming conventions in North America. This also marks our very first time exhibiting in the North American market, and we hope to connect with even more players there!P.S. We’ve prepared some fun goodies for attendees—if you’re at the show, be sure to stop by, try the demo, and grab some rewards!Venue: Thomas M. Menino Convention & Exhibition Center, Boston, MADate: March 26 – March 29Booth: 18055While preparing for the event, development has been moving forward at full speed. Our team is working diligently on the final stages of the game. Thank you for your patience and continued support—we can’t wait to share more with you soon!

newsitems.title: Lunarium – The Game Expo 2026 Exhibition Announcement
newsitems.author: zodish.chen
newsitems.contents: We’re excited to announce that Lunarium will be appearing at The Game Expo 2026 in Melbourne this weekend!If you’re at the event, come visit our booth to try the game and share your thoughts!Venue: Melbourne Convention & Exhibition CentreEvent Dates: March 14 – March 15 Booth: IV2Before the game’s release, we’ll also be attending other overseas events, including PAX East 2026, to connect with more players and increase the game’s exposure. Stay tuned for our upcoming announcements!Thank you again to all players and fellow developers for your support, we can’t wait to meet you in person!

newsitems.title: Temporary Removal of Lunarium Demo
newsitems.author: Faraday
newsitems.contents: Hello everyone!Thank you all for your continuous interest and support for Lunarium.As development of the full version is nearing completion, and considering that save data from the Demo will not be compatible with the final game, we have decided to take down the Demo from our Steam store page starting today. From now on, we will focus all our energy on the final production and polishing of the full version to ensure the best possible gaming experience for everyone.We would like to extend our sincerest gratitude to all the players who played the Demo and provided us with valuable feedback. Every suggestion you shared has been immensely helpful in our development and optimization process.For the latest updates, development progress, and future release information, please follow our social media channels and official player communities listed below.Stay tuned for more updates and the official release date announcement!

newsitems.title: Some attempts we have made to optimize the gaming experience
newsitems.author: Lunarium
newsitems.contents: Dear players, hello everyone, since the demo of Lunarium was launched, we have received a lot of enthusiastic gameplay and feedback from players, and we are very grateful. The most frequent feedback we have received since the demo was launched is that the feel and actions need improvement. We attach great importance to your feedback and have been researching and trying to optimize it since the demo was launched. At present, we have made the following adjustments to the combat actions: Enhanced the interrupt performance of the call shot action, now you can interrupt the current action at any time during the attack and use the call shot. You can also use the call shot immediately after dodging, and you can use defense at any time during the shooting action. It is hoped that this will improve the problem of the cumbersome coordination of attacks. {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44984177/48ab89473091a9b5dc7a4e2cf0271702406c13bb.gif Additionally, we have optimized the animation of the attack action and adjusted the interrupt performance of many actions, hoping to improve the issue of sticky feedback from players. {STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44984177/fb34f6e79e63a5af06ce45c8110a075dd65faaa2.gif There are still many minor changes that will not be mentioned one by one. Our optimization will not stop here, and we will continue to accumulate experience, modify and optimize various gameplay and feel, hoping that the official version can bring everyone a better gaming experience.

newsitems.title: Watch developers play the Lunarium Demo!
newsitems.author: Lunarium
newsitems.contents: Try our demo for free! If you like it, please add our game to your wish list! It would be even better if you could leave a positive review, which is a huge encouragement for us!

newsitems.title: 0.4.5Beta Demo Patch Notes
newsitems.author: Lunarium
newsitems.contents: This update represents a more polished version of the demo, with significant improvements to localization implementation. However, please note that the current translation quality remains provisional - the full release will feature completely revised translations. We're deeply grateful to all players who have tested and provided feedback so far. We hope you enjoy the game! • Added sound effects and VFX to the Skill Tree interface • Optimized localization content accuracy • Implemented menu functionality localization support • Introduced collectible rewards in level exploration • Added anti-misclick protection for dialogue choices/tutorial pop-ups (prevents instant closure) • Improved animation transitions between attack and movement states • Added a "Thank You for Playing" screen upon game completion • Enhanced cinematic sequences after returning to the village hub • Upgraded visual fidelity in key environmental scenes • Fixed critical stability issues that could cause runtime crashes • Reworked Focus mechanics:  - Charged Attack now generates Focus  - Stellar Thrust skill buffed with +1 Focus consumption

newsitems.title: 0.4.3 Beta Patch Notes
newsitems.author: Lunarium
newsitems.contents: • Fixed an issue where the camera could remain locked in place after combat. • Resolved several cases that could cause black screens when loading saved games. • Added the ability to access the settings menu directly from in-game. • Implemented an option to quit the game from the in-game settings menu. • Added UI feedback for localization selection.

newsitems.title: Patch Notes 2025/02/17
newsitems.author: Lunarium
newsitems.contents: • Fixed an issue where the bench save point would become corrupted after defeating the "Giant Plant Boss". • Resolved a bug that could prevent proper respawning after dying during the "Giant Plant Boss" or subsequent boss fights. • Addressed an issue causing incorrect load behavior when reopening the game after the "Giant Plant Boss" encounter.

newsitems.title: Nice to meet you. We are Lunarium Studio！
newsitems.author: Lunarium
newsitems.contents: Hello everyone, we are Lunarium Studio! We're thrilled to present our first sandbox-style fantasy action-adventure game "Star Journey" on Steam. If you enjoy our game, please add it to your wishlist - your support means everything to us. Thank you so much! Since the start of development, we have received tremendous attention and support from our player community. With everyone's encouragement, we've made significant progress in development - improving many aspects compared to our initial offline debut, while adding and optimizing numerous features! Currently, we're accelerating development to release a demo during the upcoming festival for our official debut! Please hold on a little longer for us! We warmly welcome all players to communicate with us and invite everyone to follow and grow alongside us. You can connect with and reach us through the following channels: QQ：617507065 Bilibili：https://space.bilibili.com/3493081953339844?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0 Afdian：https://afdian.com/a/lunarium Weibo：https://weibo.com/u/7826357316 X：https://x.com/Lunarium_studio We will post the latest development updates on various platforms and share game information in the group. Fans who like us, don't miss out! Welcome to come and join us!
